name: Atlassian Empty Access Groups
description: Detects empty groups in atlassian that may indicate stale access governance artifacts.
query: SELECT g.group_id AS id, g.name AS group_name FROM atlassian_groups g LEFT JOIN atlassian_group_memberships m ON g.group_id = m.group_id WHERE m.group_id IS NULL
remediation: Delete stale groups or document their future purpose and ownership before retaining them.
